sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58766" key="komari/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κομᾰρίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a fish, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:47" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
